content.full_text:
Memorandum

March 11, 1983

TO: File

FROM: Barbara Milman

RE: Oath of Office for Commissioners
Advice No. M-83-062

Every Commissioner must take an oath of office. Const. Art. XX, Sec. 3; Government Code Section 1360. The oath may be administered by any officer authorized to administer oaths. Government Code Section 1362. Every executive and judicial officer and member of the legislature may administer voters. Government Code Section 1225. Civil executive officers include department heads, department secretaries, division chiefs and many others. Government Code Section 1001. Notaries and court clerks may also administer oaths. Code of Civil Procedure Section 2093.

BAM:km
